title: At a Certain Location in Tokyo
overview: Magi and Yaeko, two liberal arts students, have a fateful encounter with the strange Mogura.

title: Spirit = Human
overview: Mogura describes the hell on Earth he experienced when he was drafted.

title: The Gathered Crew
overview: Magi and Yaeko are introduced to true exorcisms.

title: The Mystery of the Mad Dog and the Red Panda
overview: Magi's workplace becomes infested with spirits.

title: Trigger
overview: Magi's younger brother is disturbed to discover his friend's family doting on an old child's doll.

title: Brothers and Sisters
overview: Shio learns that Kyoshiro's mother Kyoko has her own unique supernatural ability.

title: The Trap of Only Seeing Results
overview: Sakurako takes home a maneki-neko in accordance with Kyoko's vision, but her problems remain unresolved.

title: The Merfolk
overview: Yaeko invites Mogura and the others to visit her hometown during its merfolk festival.

title: The Great Mother's Love
overview: Mogura and his companions uncover the underbelly of Yaeko's island.

title: True Worth
overview: Yaeko's friend Mori describes the psychological abuse he suffered at the hands of the island's "Royal Family."

title: The Merfolk and the Bakeneko
overview: Mogura and his companions uncover the truth about the Samejima family, the island's legend, and the merfolk.
